sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n8540" key="a)/neuktos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἄνευκτος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n8540.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">not wishing, not praying,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">εὐχομένοις καὶ ἀνεύκτοις</quote_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.108</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
